prs_created.description: refactor: use libspectrum_new0 in buffer, rzx, and dck alloc functions
test: add snap custom_rom, RAM pages, and interface1 tests (97-99)

checked_off_by_maintainer: Apply patch for CI typo fix + macOS autoreconf cleanup (applied as commit 24bfa0d)
Apply patch for new buffer tests (test_83, test_84) - applied as commit 0cee5e9
Apply patch to upgrade SourceForge URLs from http to https - applied as commit 03276e4
Apply patch for pkg.m4 update (applied as commit b35d447)
Apply patch for creator const-correctness (applied as commit f9c310a)
Apply patch for buffer realloc optimization + AC_C_CONST removal (applied as commits e7cd26e and 03e922f)
Creator tests PR (tests 85-87) merged as commit 094ae28
PR #15 snap Z80 register tests (88-90) merged as commit d9e921a
PR #16 creator_alloc zero-init fix merged as commit d84f7ee
PR #18 microdrive API tests (91-93) and snap peripheral tests (94-96) merged as commit bcd05f3
notes: No regular open issues in the repo. Workflow files (.github/workflows/) are protected. Past changes applied by maintainer directly to master: libxml2 CI removal (5367634), buffer tests (0251ad2), buffer byte arrays (e7030f4), CI typo fix (24bfa0d), buffer set/append tests (0cee5e9), HTTPS URLs (03276e4), pkg.m4 update (b35d447), creator const (f9c310a), stdatomic C23 fix (ec5e009), buffer realloc optimize (e7cd26e), remove AC_C_CONST (03e922f), creator API tests 85-87 (094ae28), snap Z80 register tests 88-90 (d9e921a), creator_alloc zero-init (d84f7ee), microdrive+snap peripheral tests 91-96 (bcd05f3). PR #19 (libspectrum_new0 in buffer/rzx/dck alloc) is open. PR aw_pr20 (snap custom_rom, RAM pages, interface1 tests 97-99) is open. Build: ./autogen.sh && ./configure --with-fake-glib && make. Tests: make check. Next runs: after PRs merged, consider tests for AY registers array, Betadisk, ZXATASP snap fields, tape_accessors, IDE functions.
